name: preset-agent-skills
description: Preset API skills for authentication, workspace discovery, and read-only dashboard and dataset inspection.

interface.shortDescription: Authenticate with Preset and inspect workspaces, dashboards, and datasets.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using the public Preset Management API and workspace Superset APIs. Includes guarded authentication guidance, workspace discovery, and read-only dashboard and dataset examples.
defaultPrompt: List dashboards in a Preset workspace
